doc_content.summary: Analyzes Claude Code session history (~/.claude/history.jsonl) to extract usage patterns, skill invocations, action frequencies, and user corrections, synthesizing this data into actionable per-project markdown reports.
key_features: Parses local ~/.claude/history.jsonl and segments contexts by project path
Implements inline Python heuristics for session duration and boundary detection
Categorizes sessions dynamically (Build, Review, Debug, Architecture, Maintenance)
Identifies friction points by isolating user correction/frustration prompts
Generates a bespoke narrative synthesis and specific recommendations based on extracted metrics
Avoids redundant processing with hash/count-based cache skipping

alt_text: An architectural flow diagram of the stark-session-insights skill showing the data pipeline from reading Claude's history.jsonl through parsing, inline Python analysis phases like action patterns and session shape, to writing localized markdown insight files.
